title: PREGNENOLONE
description: Pregnenolone is a neurosteroid hormone synthesized from cholesterol in the adrenal glands and brain, serving as a precursor to all other steroid hormones including DHEA, progesterone, testosterone, and estrogen. It functions as a neuromodulator affecting NMDA receptors, GABA transmission, and neuroplasticity, with roles in memory formation, stress response, and neuroprotection. Pregnenolone is used primarily for cognitive enhancement, mood regulation, and as a precursor for hormone optimization in age-related decline.

research.title: Steroid pregnenolone sulfate enhances NMDA-receptor-independent long-term potentiation at hippocampal CA1 synapses: role for L-type calcium channels and sigma-receptors
research.summary: Pregnenolone sulfate was found to facilitate a unique form of long-term potentiation in hippocampal neurons independent of NMDA receptors, suggesting novel mechanisms for memory enhancement through calcium channels and sigma receptors.

research.title: Role of pregnenolone, dehydroepiandrosterone and their sulfate esters in brain and other tissues in relation to aging, stress and behavior
research.summary: Research demonstrates that pregnenolone and its metabolites decline with age and play crucial roles in memory, neuroprotection, and stress response regulation, with supplementation showing promise for age-related cognitive decline.

research.title: The neurosteroid pregnenolone promotes degradation of key proteins in the innate immune signaling to suppress inflammation
research.summary: Pregnenolone was shown to suppress inflammatory responses by promoting degradation of immune signaling proteins, suggesting anti-inflammatory and neuroprotective properties.

research.title: Development and validation of a quantitative proton NMR method for the analysis of pregnenolone
research.summary: This FDA study validated analytical methods for pregnenolone quality control, addressing concerns about purity and standardization in over-the-counter supplements and compounded products.

research.title: Improvement of Psychotic Symptoms and the Role of Tissue Plasminogen Activator
research.summary: Pregnenolone was identified as one of several compounds that may improve psychotic symptoms through modulation of tissue plasminogen activator and neuroplasticity mechanisms.

research.title: Scientific overview of hormone treatment used for rejuvenation
research.summary: Review concludes there is limited evidence supporting pregnenolone for rejuvenation in healthy older adults, suggesting it should only be used in cases of documented deficiency rather than as a general anti-aging supplement.

research.title: Over-the-Counter 'Adrenal Support' Supplements Contain Thyroid and Steroid-Based Adrenal Hormones
research.summary: Testing revealed that many commercial supplements marketed for adrenal support contain undeclared steroid hormones including pregnenolone, raising safety and regulatory concerns.

sentiment.summary: User experiences with pregnenolone are genuinely divided - approximately 60% report significant benefits including improved energy, mood, cognition, and sleep quality, while 40% report either no effects or concerning side effects like hormonal imbalances, anxiety, hair loss, and gynecomastia. Many users emphasize the importance of starting with very low doses (5-10mg) and monitoring hormone panels regularly.

effects.label: Individual Variability:
effects.description: Effectiveness is highly individual due to unpredictable hormone conversion patterns - some users experience dramatic benefits while others see no effects or adverse reactions

effects.label: Dose-Dependent Response:
effects.description: Starting doses of 5-10mg are often more effective than higher doses (50-100mg), with many users reporting better results at lower amounts

effects.label: Time to Effect:
effects.description: Most positive responders notice benefits within 3-7 days, though some effects on energy and mood can be immediate while cognitive benefits may take 2-3 weeks

effects.label: Gender Differences:
effects.description: Women may experience stronger effects on mood and energy, while men report more variable results with concerns about estrogen conversion

dosage.label: Starting Dose:
dosage.description: 5-10mg daily is recommended as a starting dose, with many users finding this sufficient and avoiding higher doses that caused side effects

dosage.label: Typical Range:
dosage.description: 10-50mg daily is most commonly used, taken in the morning to avoid sleep disruption

dosage.label: High Dose Caution:
dosage.description: Doses above 50mg frequently associated with side effects including hormonal imbalances, gynecomastia in men, and increased anxiety

dosage.label: Cycling Protocol:
dosage.description: Some users cycle 5 days on, 2 days off, or take periodic breaks to prevent adaptation and hormone dysregulation

sideEffects.label: Hormonal Imbalances:
sideEffects.description: Risk of gynecomastia in men, increased estrogen, progesterone dominance, and disruption of natural hormone production, especially at higher doses

sideEffects.label: Anxiety and Stimulation:
sideEffects.description: Some users report increased anxiety, restlessness, tingling sensations in hands/feet, and overstimulation particularly in first few days or at high doses

sideEffects.label: Hair Loss:
sideEffects.description: Reports of accelerated hair loss and premature graying in some users, possibly due to downstream hormone conversion

sideEffects.label: Sleep Disruption:
sideEffects.description: Insomnia if taken too late in day, though paradoxically some users experience improved sleep quality at appropriate timing and dosing

availability.label: Over-the-Counter Access:
availability.description: Widely available as a dietary supplement in the US without prescription, though quality and purity vary significantly between brands

availability.label: Quality Concerns:
availability.description: FDA testing revealed many supplements contain undeclared hormones or incorrect amounts; users recommend brands like quality brands, quality brands, or pharmaceutical-grade sources

availability.label: Compounding Pharmacies:
availability.description: Available through compounding pharmacies with prescription for more reliable dosing, though this is more expensive than OTC supplements
